flow_summary: Establish stakes, teach workflow, introduce AI affordances, then complicate with legal/ethical layers and close with synthesis.

acts_or_phases.label: Framing
acts_or_phases.goal: Motivate why screenplays and AI together matter now

acts_or_phases.label: Tools in practice
acts_or_phases.goal: Show how models assist ideation and drafting

progression_notes: Each block adds a layer: craft, then capability, then consequence.
rhetorical_strategy: Instructor narrative with pauses for discussion on later slides
transitions: Once we see what the tools do, we should ask who gets credit…
Bringing it back to what you will try in class…
